title: Generating a nested data structure from a prompt
scenario: Write a prompt that generates a nested data structure representing a company's organizational hierarchy. The structure should include 5 levels of hierarchy, with each level having a unique set of attributes. The prompt should use an informal tone and be under 200 words.
constraints: Must use a nested structure to represent the hierarchy
Must include attributes for each level of hierarchy
Must be generated based on the prompt

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the prompt accurately generate a nested data structure representing the organizational hierarchy?
Does the prompt include attributes for each level of hierarchy?
Does the prompt accurately generate the data structure based on the prompt?
Does the prompt accurately implement the specified constraints?
